10001100000000010000000000000001
00100000000000100000000000000000
00100000000000110000000000000000
00100000000001000000000000000010
00010000010000010000000000011010
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000100000100011000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
10001100110001110000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00110000111010000000000000000001
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00010001000000000000000000000101
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00100000011000110000000000000001
00100000010000100000000000000001
00001000000000000000000000000100
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
10101100000000110000000000000000
STOP
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000100
00000000000000000000000000000011
00000000000000000000000000000010
00000000000000000000000000000101
00000000000000000000000000000101
STOP
00: LW $1, 1($0)
01: ADDI $2, $0, 0
02: ADDI $3, $0, 0
03: ADDI $4, $0, 2
04: BEQ $2, $1, 26
05: NOOP
06: NOOP
07: NOOP
08: ADD $6, $4, $2
09: NOOP
10: NOOP
11: NOOP
12: LW $7, 0($6)
13: NOOP
14: NOOP
15: NOOP
16: ANDI $8, $7, 1
17: NOOP
18: NOOP
19: NOOP
20: BEQ $8, $0, 5
21: NOOP
22: NOOP
23: NOOP
24: ADDI $3, $3, 1
25: ADDI $2, $2, 1
26: J 4
27: NOOP
28: NOOP
29: NOOP
30: SW $3, 0($0)
STOP

Acest set de instructiuni parcurge un sir de N numere stocate in memorie incepand cu adresa 2,
verifica cate dintre aceste numere sunt impare si salveaza acceasta valoare in memorie.

B"100011_00000_00001_0000000000000001",  --  00: LW $1, 1($0)    ; $1 = N
B"001000_00000_00010_0000000000000000",  --  01: ADDI $2, $0, 0  ; $2 = index = 0
B"001000_00000_00011_0000000000000000",  --  02: ADDI $3, $0, 0  ; $3 = contor = 0
B"001000_00000_00100_0000000000000010",  --  03: ADDI $4, $0, 2  ; $4 = adresa de  nceput a sirului
B"000100_00010_00001_0000000000011010",  --  04: BEQ $2, $1, 26  ; dac? index == N, sari la instructiunea 30
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  05: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  06: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  07: NOOP
B"000000_00100_00010_00110_00000_100000",--  08: ADD $6, $4, $2  ; $6 = adresa elementului curent
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  09: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  10: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  11: NOOP
B"100011_00110_00111_0000000000000000",  --  12: LW $7, 0($6)    ; $7 = valoarea elementului curent
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  13: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  14: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  15: NOOP
B"001100_00111_01000_0000000000000001",  --  16: ANDI $8, $7, 1  ; $8 = $7 & 1
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  17: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  18: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  19: NOOP
B"000100_01000_00000_0000000000000101",  --  20: BEQ $8, $0, 5   ; daca $8 == 0, e par
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  21: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  22: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  23: NOOP
B"001000_00011_00011_0000000000000001",  --  24: ADDI $3, $3, 1  ; increment contor
B"001000_00010_00010_0000000000000001",  --  25: ADDI $2, $2, 1  ; increment index
B"000010_00000000000000000000000100",    --  26: J 4             ; sari la instructiunea 4
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  27: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  28: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  29: NOOP
B"101011_00000_00011_0000000000000000",  --  30: SW $3, 0($0)    ; scrie contorul la adresa 0
